title: Git-Cliff Release Changelog Capability Pack Skill

copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack.zip -o git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack.zip -d ./git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack

Usage:
Use this skill to enforce changelog quality from commit history through release publication.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the git-cliff release changelog capability pack for this release."

# Required output
1) Conventional commit compliance report
2) Proposed release version and rationale
3) Generated changelog sections
4) Tag/release execution checklist
detailMarkdown:
# Git-Cliff Release Changelog Capability Pack Skill

Expert release-changelog capability pack for git-cliff with conventional commits, deterministic release notes, and low-maintenance versioning.

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack.zip -o git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack.zip -d ./git-cliff-release-changelog-capability-pack
```

## Usage
Use this skill to enforce changelog quality from commit history through release publication.
